jobs.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
jobs.summary:
Savon Nexo is seeking a Business Intelligence Analyst to help retail and small-to-mid-sized business clients turn operational data into clear, actionable insights. This role will focus on building dashboards, reporting systems, KPI trackers, and business performance summaries that support smarter decisions across sales, inventory, pricing, promotions, vendors, and customer behavior.

The ideal candidate should be comfortable working with business users, understanding operational questions, cleaning and organizing data, and translating raw information into meaningful visual reports. This position is well-suited for someone with strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and experience using tools such as Power BI, Excel, SQL, and data visualization platforms.

Key Responsibilities:

Build dashboards and reports for sales, inventory, pricing, marketing, and operational KPIs
Analyze business performance trends and identify actionable insights
Translate business questions into clear charts, metrics, and reporting logic
Clean, organize, and validate data from POS, ecommerce, vendor, and internal systems
Support forecasting, competitor monitoring, promotion tracking, and margin analysis
Work with business teams to improve reporting accuracy and decision-making

jobs.title: AI Solutions Engineer
jobs.summary:
Savon Nexo is seeking an AI Solutions Engineer to design, develop, and implement practical AI-powered solutions for small and mid-sized business clients. This role focuses on using artificial intelligence, automation, data workflows, and large language model tools to help businesses reduce manual work, improve reporting, generate insights, and operate more efficiently.

The AI Solutions Engineer will work closely with business and analytics teams to understand client needs, identify automation opportunities, and build solutions that are useful in real business operations. This may include AI-assisted reporting tools, automated data summaries, customer support workflows, document processing systems, prompt-based business tools, and internal productivity automations.

The ideal candidate should have strong problem-solving skills, experience with Python or automation tools, an understanding of large language models, and the ability to turn business requirements into working AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities
Design and build AI-powered tools for business reporting, automation, and operational efficiency
Develop LLM-based workflows for summarization, data analysis, customer support, and document processing
Use Python, APIs, and automation platforms to connect business systems and AI tools
Create and refine prompts, workflows, and logic for reliable AI-assisted outputs
Work with business teams to identify repetitive tasks that can be automated
Build internal tools that support analytics, ecommerce, reporting, and decision-making
Test AI solutions for accuracy, reliability, usability, and business value
Document workflows, technical processes, and user instructions
Monitor and improve AI systems based on client feedback and performance
Preferred Qualifications
Experience with Python, APIs, automation tools, or workflow platforms
Understanding of large language models, prompt engineering, and AI-assisted applications
Familiarity with data analysis, reporting, dashboards, or business intelligence concepts
Ability to understand business problems and convert them into technical solutions
Strong communication, documentation, and problem-solving skills
Experience with web tools, ecommerce systems, or small-business operations is a plus

jobs.title: Web Solutions Developer
jobs.summary: Build and maintain client websites — landing pages, ecommerce content, and product visibility tooling.
